calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Carrie Hamilton, 415-756-7119, defendant and moving party appearing propria persona

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT CARRIE HAMILTON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE COMPLAINT PROPERLY STATES THAT THE DEFENDANT BREACHED THE LEASE AGREEMENT AND THAT DEFENDANT WAS PROPERLY SERVED WITH A NOTICE OF TERMINATION. WHETHER DEFENDANT AND BLUE COMMITTED CRIMINAL ACTS THAT ARE A THREAT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY IS A FACTUAL MATTER THAT SHOULD BE DETERMINED AT TRIAL, NOT BY DEMURRER. DEFENDANT HAS FIVE DAYS TO ANSWER. Judge: John K. Stewart, Reporter: Susan Crozier CSR # 4761 (301/JKS/AL)
